title: Feta Topped Sauteed Middle Eastern Farro Bowl
description: An earthy and chewy farro bowl sauteed with warm Middle Eastern spices and fresh spinach, topped with crumbly feta cheese and perfect for a high-protein bento box lunch.
instructions: Cook the farro in boiling salted water for 20 minutes until tender yet chewy, then drain well.
Heat one tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the drained chickpeas and zaatar spice to the skillet, sauteing for 5 minutes until fragrant.
Tir in the cooked farro and remaining olive oil, tossing to combine and warm through.
Add the baby spinach and cook for 2 minutes until just wilted.
Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the fresh lemon juice.
Divide the sauteed farro mixture equally into your bento boxes.
Top each portion with the halved cherry tomatoes and crumbled feta cheese before serving.
